query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN contactPushName IS NOT NULL AND contactPushName != '' AND contactPushName NOT REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_real_name, SUM(CASE WHEN contactPushName IS NULL OR contactPushName = '' OR contactPushName REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_name FROM wa_conversations WHERE sessionId = 'crm-210002-240001'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN contactPushName IS NOT NULL AND contactPushName != '' AND contactPushName NOT REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_real_name, SUM(CASE WHEN contactPushName IS NULL OR contactPushName = '' OR contactPushName REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_name FROM wa_conversations WHERE sessionId = 'crm-210002-240001'
